title: Amit Shah hails Nitish Kumar's return to national politics as Rajya Sabha MP - ‘His Bihar tenure was truly glorious’
description: Amit Shah praises Nitish Kumar's impactful tenure as Bihar's Chief Minister while welcoming his return to the Rajya Sabha. Amidst political rivalry, Kumar's nomination highlights the NDA's strategy and the ever-changing dynamics in Bihar politics. What does this mean for the future of Bihar?
